inline_comments.message: Does changed files need to be computed a priori and placed here, or is this generated?

I'm going to generate it using the release scripts, I'm going to add an action to the last phase to automatically generate the file.

It has to be done in the very last phase because everything needs to be at their latest correct revisions so that the CSITs will use the correct versions of everything.

I tried to do this by reading information from Gerrit/Nexus/Github but it's very complex to do it that way.
